title: nasturtium spinosum
intro: Nasturtium spinosum, also known as prickly nasturtium or Mexican marigold, is a flowering plant species native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, making it effective in treating various ailments such as skin irritations, wounds, and infections. The health benefits of Nasturtium spinosum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing, as well as its potential to exhibit antioxidant and antiviral properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, salves, and infusions for medicinal use, and its flowers and leaves can be used fresh or dried for various herbal preparations.
